name: Gorilla Glue Wood Glue
description:
Experience superior bonding power with Gorilla Wood Glue, a high-strength, cross-linking PVA formula designed for exceptional performance. This advanced adhesive ensures a fast set speed, significantly reducing project wait times and increasing efficiency.

Formulated to be water-resistant, it provides reliable and durable results for both interior and exterior applications. Whether you're working on furniture repair, woodworking projects, or general carpentry, Gorilla Wood Glue offers the versatility and robust hold you need for lasting connections.
